name: www.kombuchaparty.store Beginner Kombucha Starter Kit
description: A beginner-friendly all-in-one kit for first-time brewers, centered on a SCOBY, starter tea, tea, sugar, and a clear step-by-step guide. Best positioned as the simplest way to start brewing kombucha at home.

name: www.kombuchaparty.store Kombucha Education Kit
description: A classroom-ready kit designed for educators, with brewing basics, beginner instructions, and enough materials to teach the fermentation process in a hands-on way. Ideal for students, workshops, or family learning.

name: www.kombuchaparty.store Deluxe Beginner Kit with Bottles
description: A more complete starter bundle that includes everything in the beginner kit plus swing-top bottles and bottling tools for second fermentation. Good for customers who want a fuller first-batch experience.

name: www.kombuchaparty.store SCOBY + Starter Tea Essentials Pack
description: A low-friction entry product for buyers who already have jars and want only the live culture, starter liquid, and basic brewing guidance. Useful as a lower-priced add-on or repeat purchase item.

name: www.kombuchaparty.store Refill & Flavor Pack
description: A consumables bundle with tea, sugar, flavoring ideas, and second-fermentation support for people who have already brewed once and want to keep going. Good for subscriptions and repeat sales.
